testimonial: Before partnering with this initiative, selling our mangoes was always uncertain and often unfair. Middlemen would take a huge cut, and we had little support in improving our practices.
name: Ramesh Patil

testimonial: Joining this platform has been a turning point for our family farm. We were introduced to ethical farming techniques and learned how to reduce chemical use without compromising on yield.
name: Sujata More
